label: LocalVQE-Pi-v1-49k
measured: whole-clip GTCRN-AEC forward (ggml graph), 1 thread, test_gtcrn --bench --ggml on a Raspberry Pi 5 Model B (Ubuntu 24.04); 8 s clip in 388 ms. The DSP echo-cancel front-end runs on top of this on CPU.
source: fallback (LocalVQE README, Raspberry Pi line). Re-measure with bench_pi.sh on your own Pi to overwrite.
